title: Valid Palindrome
problem_statement: Determine if a string is a palindrome considering only alphanumeric characters and ignoring case.

examples.input: s = "A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"
examples.explanation: After removing non-alphanumeric characters and ignoring case, the string is a palindrome.

intuition: Use two pointers to compare valid characters from both ends, skipping non-alphanumeric characters.

approaches.name: Two-pointer palindrome check
approaches.description: Move left and right pointers inward while skipping invalid characters and comparing lowercase values.
approaches.why_not: Building a filtered string uses extra space unnecessarily.

interview_qa.a: Non-alphanumeric characters like punctuation and spaces are ignored.
